threats.title: FortiBleed Targeted FortiGate Firewalls in 110 Million-Credential Harvesting Operation
threats.summary: A Russian-speaking initial access broker (IAB) driven by financial gain is assessed to be behind a large-scale credential-harvesting operation known as FortiBleed that has targeted over 430,000 FortiGate firewalls globally. threats.title: Fake AI Agent Skill Passed Security Scans and Reportedly Reached 26,000 Agents
threats.summary: Security firm AIR built a fake AI agent skill, pushed it through a popular skill marketplace and an Instagram ad, and says it reached roughly 26,000 agents, including some on corporate accounts. threats.title: Trump Order Sets 2030 Deadline for Federal Post-Quantum Crypto Migration
threats.summary: President Trump signed an executive order on June 22 setting hard deadlines for federal agencies to move high-value assets and high-impact systems to post-quantum cryptography. threats.title: GitHub Updates actions/checkout to Block Common Pwn Request Attack Patterns
threats.summary: GitHub is moving to strengthen software supply chain security by updating "actions/checkout" to block pwn request attacks that exploit the risky use of the "pull_request_target workflow" trigger to run malicious code with the workflow's full privileges.
